title: WynnCraft: Lava and Ice Totems
description: Replaces the Totem & Skyseer totems in WynnCraft with a Lava & Ice reskin, more akin to ice magic & necromancy. Dedicated to sadobunny and Sebseb2222.
body:
This resource pack replaces:
- The regular shaman totem with an ice totem
- The premium skyseer totem with a lava totem

![Both totems side by side with shaders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1117dac91c7f8e5b2481cc3cc743c5a6994b828_0.webp)

![Both totems in Molten Heights](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0e6365e2ace96faf118d9b5005f0bd8b3a196bf_0.webp)

Credits to sadobunny for the shader screenshots
